chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-1335 of 2020 (Ali Sher Nangrejo Vs. Province of Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For direction. 1. For Orders on CMA No. 6668/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For Orders on CMA No. 6669/2023 (Contempt/A) 22-02-2024. Mr. J.K Jarward, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ******** 1. Granted. 2. The petitioner way of listed application has sought for initiating the contempt proceedings against the contemnors allegedly for having failed to comply with the order dated 19-01-2023 of this Court, which as per learned AAG Sindh has already been complied with by making disposal of the application of the petitioner by Deputy Commissioner Naushahro Feroze; such fact is confirmed even by learned counsel for the petitioner by contending that the direction issued by Deputy Commissioner Naushahro Feroze on disposal of application of the petitioner is not being complied with. If it is believed to be so, even then no case for initiating the contempt proceedings against the alleged contemnor is made out simply for the reason that the order passed by this Court was only to the extent of disposal of the application of the petitioner by Deputy Commissioner Naushahro Feroze, which has been disposed of. In view of above, the listed application is dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge 2 Nasim/P.A
